title: Building Jump
result_description: You jump up out of one location and drop into another, cut together at the apex into one continuous super-jump.

inputs.name: jump_up_A
inputs.what_to_film: Location A: film yourself crouching and JUMPING UP, exiting the top of frame.

inputs.name: drop_in_B
inputs.what_to_film: Location B: film yourself DROPPING INTO frame and landing, matching the same body angle. Match framing and motion direction at the cut point (the apex of the jump).

params.note: place clip A then clip B on the timeline
trim to the moment you leave frame at the top
trim the start to the moment you enter from the top
cut them together at that apex so the match cut makes one continuous super-jump
add a tiny speed ramp for punch; add a whoosh/impact SFX on the landing

result.description: One seamless super-jump from location A to location B.
success_criteria: Cut is hidden at the jump apex
Body angle/motion direction match across the cut
